sections.heading: Finger Positioning
sections.body: Each finger is responsible for specific keys. Left index on F, Right index on J. Each finger reaches for its assigned keys without moving the hand position.

sections.heading: Practice Content
sections.body:
main accha hoon
tum kaise ho
yah bahut achha hai
hum sab saath mein hain
kya tum chalte ho
haan main samajhta hoon
nahi mujhe nahi chahiye
aao baithte hain
yahan aao
dekho yeh dekho

sections.heading: Speed Tips
sections.body:
1. Do not look at the keyboard
2. Keep a steady rhythm
3. Practice for 15-20 minutes daily
4. Track your WPM and accuracy over time

summary: Consistent practice will improve your typing speed within weeks.
